calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Cheri Gorman, litigation specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Darius A. Zbrickas.
Default was entered against defendant on September 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Darius A. Zbrickas as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,225.71.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,343.62.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $428.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,997.33.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Continued To Feb-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
